title: Server Backup
description: Automatic and manual server backup plugin with custom naming and easy restoration for Bukkit/Paper servers
body:
# ServerBackup

A comprehensive Bukkit/Paper plugin for automated and manual server backups with custom naming and easy restoration.

## Features

- **Automatic Backups**: Configurable scheduled backups (hourly, daily, weekly)
- **Manual Backups**: Create backups instantly with custom names
- **Easy Restoration**: Simple commands to restore any backup
- **World Selection**: Choose which worlds to include in backups
- **Additional Files**: Include plugins, configs, and other server files
- **Smart Cleanup**: Automatically remove old backups to save space
- **Batch Restoration**: Includes Windows .bat file for easy manual restoration
- **Tab Completion**: Full command auto-completion support
- **Permission System**: Granular permissions for different backup operations

## Commands

- `/backup` - Create a backup with default name
- `/backup create [name]` - Create a backup with custom name
- `/backup list` - List all available backups
- `/backup load <filename>` - Restore a backup
- `/backup delete <filename>` - Delete a backup file
- `/backup reload` - Reload plugin configuration
- `/backup help` - Show help information

## Permissions

- `serverbackup.use` - Basic backup commands (default: op)
- `serverbackup.admin` - Admin commands (reload, delete)
- `serverbackup.load` - Restore backups

## Configuration

The plugin creates a detailed config file with options for:
- Automatic backup intervals
- World selection
- Additional files to backup
- Cleanup settings
- Custom messages

## Requirements

- Bukkit, Spigot, or Paper server
- Minecraft 1.21+
- Java 21+
